title: Separate historical grapheme evidence from modern divination meanings

positions.summary: Treat characters, code points, transliterations, and the 24-rune sequence as historical or standards-backed identity facts.
Treat keywords and prompts as a separately labeled modern reflection layer.

default_policy.rationale: Historical identity can be asserted as fact; modern divination meanings cannot be back-projected onto the artifact evidence.

user_disclosure: Rune characters and sequence have historical or standards provenance; the reading keywords are modern project-authored reflection.
